channel.title: Compatibilities on WordPress FAQ
channel.description: Recent content in Compatibilities on WordPress FAQ

item.title: Are Avada and Elementor Compatible?
item.description: Avada and Elementor are incompatible because Avada relies on its own proprietary page builder, and using both together causes severe performance and layout conflicts. Based on 8 community reports. Linked sources: 8. Known Issues Avada’s built-in builder conflicts with Elementor Severe performance degradation and bloat from running two builders Layout breaking when editing Avada templates with Elementor Community Q&A Can I use Elementor with the Avada theme? No, Avada is not compatible with Elementor.

item.title: Blocksy and Elementor Compatibility Guide
item.description: While Blocksy and Elementor are fully compatible, the community warns they can impact site speed, often preferring Gutenberg with Blocksy. Based on 8 community reports. Linked sources: 8. Known Issues AMP incompatibility when using Blocksy and Elementor together Potential performance degradation and heavy page sizes Elementor requires manual speed tuning compared to Gutenberg Community Q&A Are Blocksy and Elementor compatible? Yes, Blocksy and Elementor work together, but the combination can be heavy.

item.title: Easy Digital Downloads and Elementor Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor is fully compatible with Easy Digital Downloads, especially when paired with lightweight themes like Hello Elementor or Astra. Based on 6 community reports. Linked sources: 6. Known Issues Outdated templates from third-party marketplaces may break with newer Elementor versions. Avoid heavy themes to prevent performance degradation and script conflicts. Community Q&A Is Easy Digital Downloads compatible with Elementor? Yes, Easy Digital Downloads is fully compatible with Elementor. You can easily design your digital store pages using Elementor’s drag-and-drop builder.

item.title: Elementor & All-in-One WP Security Compatibility
item.description: Elementor and All-in-One WP Security are compatible, but aggressive firewall settings may block Elementor’s editor, requiring rule adjustments. Based on 8 community reports. Linked sources: 8. Known Issues Firewall rules blocking Elementor’s REST API or admin-ajax.php requests Login lockdown features causing conflicts during active editing sessions Community Q&A Does All-in-One WP Security block the Elementor editor? Yes, certain aggressive firewall rules or brute force prevention settings in All-in-One WP Security can block Elementor’s saving mechanism or REST API.

item.title: Elementor and All in One SEO Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and All in One SEO (AIOSEO) are fully compatible, allowing users to optimize SEO settings directly within the Elementor editor interface. Based on 7 community reports. Linked sources: 7. Known Issues AIOSEO analysis might occasionally fail to read complex Elementor nested sections dynamically without a manual update. Community Q&A Is All in One SEO compatible with Elementor? Yes, All in One SEO is fully compatible with Elementor, featuring a dedicated integration that allows you to optimize your SEO content directly inside the Elementor editor panel.

item.title: Elementor and Autoptimize Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and Autoptimize are compatible, but users must exclude Elementor’s scripts and jQuery from optimization to prevent the editor and layout from breaking. Based on 6 community reports. Linked sources: 6. Known Issues JS optimization can break the Elementor editor loading screen. CSS aggregation may cause layout shifts or style rendering issues on Elementor pages. Render-blocking jQuery exclusion is often required to keep widgets functioning. Community Q&A Are Elementor and Autoptimize compatible?

item.title: Elementor and Flatsome Compatibility Guide
item.description: While technically compatible, using Elementor with Flatsome is highly redundant and not recommended because Flatsome relies on its own proprietary UX Builder. Based on 6 community reports. Linked sources: 6. Known Issues Redundant page builders (UX Builder vs Elementor) causing performance bloat Potential script conflicts between Flatsome’s built-in elements and Elementor widgets Increased page load times due to loading multiple CSS and JS frameworks Community Q&A Can I use Elementor with the Flatsome theme?

item.title: Elementor and Fluent Forms Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and Fluent Forms are highly compatible, though minor mobile layout or scroll offset issues may require custom CSS or JavaScript tweaks. Based on 7 community reports. Linked sources: 7. Known Issues Mobile scroll offset issues where buttons may not reach the form properly. Potential layout or spacing conflicts on mobile devices. Community Q&A Are Elementor and Fluent Forms compatible? Yes, Elementor and Fluent Forms are fully compatible. You can easily embed Fluent Forms into Elementor pages using shortcodes or dedicated widgets.

item.title: Elementor and Gravity Forms Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and Gravity Forms are highly compatible, with native widgets and third-party addons making integration and styling seamless. Based on 6 community reports. Linked sources: 6. Known Issues Styling conflicts can occur if theme styles override Elementor or Gravity Forms default CSS. Requires Elementor Pro or a third-party addon for deep widget integration. Community Q&A Are Elementor and Gravity Forms compatible? Yes, they are fully compatible. Elementor Pro includes a native Gravity Forms widget to easily embed and style your forms.

item.title: Elementor and Hello Elementor Theme Compatibility Guide
item.description: Hello Elementor is the official, lightweight blank canvas theme designed for seamless compatibility and optimal performance with the Elementor page builder. Based on 8 community reports. Linked sources: 8. Known Issues Third-party Elementor addons can sometimes cause fatal errors or conflicts Users transitioning from traditional themes may find the blank canvas approach requires more initial setup Community Q&A Is Hello Elementor compatible with the Elementor page builder? Yes, Hello Elementor is the official theme developed by Elementor specifically to serve as a lightweight, fully compatible blank canvas for the page builder.

item.title: Elementor and iThemes Security Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and iThemes Security (Solid Security) are highly compatible, though minor configuration adjustments may be needed for admin AJAX and file permissions. Based on 6 community reports. Linked sources: 6. Known Issues Admin AJAX blocking can prevent Elementor editor from loading File permission restrictions may block Elementor style generation Community Q&A Are Elementor and iThemes Security compatible? Yes, they are compatible. However, you must ensure that security rules do not block admin-ajax.

item.title: Elementor and Kadence Compatibility Guide
item.description: While technically possible to use both, combining Elementor and Kadence often leads to layout conflicts and performance bloat, so choosing one is highly recommended. Based on 8 community reports. Linked sources: 8. Known Issues Layout conflicts when Elementor Theme Builder overrides Kadence templates. Performance degradation and heavy page sizes when loading both asset libraries. Elementor content does not automatically convert to Kadence/Gutenberg blocks when switching. Community Q&A Can I use Elementor and Kadence Blocks together on the same WordPress site?

item.title: Elementor and LiteSpeed Cache Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and LiteSpeed Cache are highly compatible, but users must regenerate Elementor CSS and purge LiteSpeed/CDN caches to see layout updates. Based on 8 community reports. Linked sources: 9. Known Issues Cached CSS conflicts causing broken headers or layouts after updates Changes made in Elementor editor not reflecting on the frontend due to aggressive caching Redundant database optimization plugins causing conflicts with LiteSpeed’s built-in DB tools Community Q&A Why are my Elementor changes not showing up with LiteSpeed Cache?

item.title: Elementor and Ninja Forms Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and Ninja Forms are fully compatible, serving as a reliable alternative when Elementor’s native form widget lacks advanced features. Based on 8 community reports. Linked sources: 8. Known Issues Advanced form validation requires custom JavaScript or server-side hooks. Elementor’s native form widget may lack advanced features compared to Ninja Forms. Community Q&A Are Elementor and Ninja Forms compatible? Yes, Ninja Forms is fully compatible with Elementor and is frequently used as a robust alternative to Elementor’s native form widget.

item.title: Elementor and Perfmatters Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and Perfmatters are highly compatible, with Perfmatters being widely recommended to optimize and speed up heavy Elementor-based websites. Based on 7 community reports. Linked sources: 7. Known Issues Aggressive script disabling in Perfmatters Script Manager can accidentally break Elementor editor or frontend widget functionality if not configured carefully. Community Q&A Is Perfmatters compatible with Elementor? Yes, Perfmatters is fully compatible with Elementor and is frequently used to optimize Elementor sites by disabling unused scripts, widgets, and emojis.

item.title: Elementor and Rank Math Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and Rank Math are fully compatible, though some users recommend lighter SEO alternatives to prevent performance bloat. Based on 7 community reports. Linked sources: 7. Known Issues Some users report Rank Math can feel bloated compared to lighter alternatives like The SEO Framework. AMP integration issues when combining Elementor with certain themes and SEO plugins. Community Q&A Are Elementor and Rank Math compatible? Yes, Elementor and Rank Math are fully compatible.

item.title: Elementor and SEOPress Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and SEOPress are fully compatible, with SEOPress offering seamless integration to analyze content directly within the Elementor editor. Based on 6 community reports. Linked sources: 6. Known Issues No major conflicts reported, but ensure both plugins are updated to avoid script loading issues on older themes. Community Q&A Are Elementor and SEOPress compatible? Yes, SEOPress is fully compatible with Elementor and includes a dedicated integration that allows you to manage SEO settings directly inside the Elementor live editor.

item.title: Elementor and Sucuri Compatibility Guide
item.description: There are no known direct conflicts between Elementor and Sucuri, but maintaining a lightweight theme setup is recommended for overall site stability. Based on 6 community reports. Linked sources: 6. Known Issues Lack of direct community discussions regarding Sucuri-specific conflicts in the provided dataset Outdated third-party Elementor templates breaking on newer versions Community Q&A Is Elementor compatible with Sucuri Security? Yes, Elementor is generally compatible with Sucuri. To avoid performance or script conflicts, ensure you use a lightweight, standard-compliant theme like Hello Elementor.

item.title: Elementor and SureCart Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and SureCart are fully compatible, enabling seamless drag-and-drop checkout page designs via shortcodes and dedicated widgets. Based on 6 community reports. Linked sources: 6. Known Issues No native Elementor widgets in the free version of SureCart (requires shortcodes) Potential styling conflicts with some Elementor themes Community Q&A Is SureCart compatible with Elementor? Yes, SureCart is fully compatible with Elementor. You can design your store pages and embed SureCart checkout forms using shortcodes or Gutenberg blocks.

item.title: Elementor and W3 Total Cache Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and W3 Total Cache are fully compatible, but require careful configuration of minification and page caching to avoid breaking the page builder interface. Based on 6 community reports. Linked sources: 6. Known Issues Minification of Elementor CSS/JS files in W3 Total Cache can break the layout or editor. Caching of the Elementor editor page (query strings like elementor-preview) prevents real-time editing. Community Q&A Are Elementor and W3 Total Cache compatible?

item.title: Elementor and WP Super Cache Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and WP Super Cache are fully compatible, though users should exclude Elementor’s query strings and avoid caching the active page builder interface. Based on 6 community reports. Linked sources: 6. Known Issues Caching the active Elementor editor page can cause loading loops or save failures. Regenerating Elementor CSS may require manually clearing the WP Super Cache. Community Q&A Is WP Super Cache compatible with Elementor? Yes, WP Super Cache is compatible with Elementor.

item.title: Elementor vs Oxygen Builder Compatibility & Comparison
item.description: Elementor and Oxygen Builder are separate page builders that cannot be used together on the same page, though they can coexist on a single site. Based on 6 community reports. Linked sources: 6. Known Issues Using multiple page builders simultaneously causes severe performance bloat and layout conflicts. Community Q&A Can I use Elementor and Oxygen Builder together on the same WordPress site? While you can technically activate both, it is highly discouraged due to severe performance bloat and potential layout conflicts.

item.title: Astra and Elementor Compatibility Guide
item.description: Astra and Elementor are highly compatible and widely recommended by the community, though users should optimize hosting to prevent performance bloat. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Elementor sites can become heavy and require optimized hosting/caching Potential confusion between Astra’s block editor integration and Elementor’s page builder Community Q&A Are Astra and Elementor compatible? Yes, Astra is fully compatible with Elementor. It is one of the most popular theme choices for Elementor users due to its lightweight structure and starter templates.

item.title: Beaver Builder and Elementor Compatibility Guide
item.description: While Elementor and Beaver Builder can technically run on the same site, doing so causes performance issues, so they should be used separately. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Running multiple page builders simultaneously slows down page load speeds. Asset loading conflicts between Elementor and Beaver Builder scripts. Community Q&A Can I use Elementor and Beaver Builder together on the same WordPress site? Yes, they can technically run on the same site, but it is highly discouraged due to performance degradation, script conflicts, and redundant asset loading.

item.title: Divi and Elementor Compatibility Guide
item.description: Running Divi and Elementor simultaneously causes severe performance degradation and layout conflicts, so users should choose one or the other. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Severe page speed and performance degradation Shortcode clutter when disabling Divi Layout and styling conflicts between builder CSS files Community Q&A Can I run both Divi and Elementor on the same WordPress site? While technically possible, it is highly discouraged because loading two heavy page builder frameworks severely impacts site loading speeds and causes layout conflicts.

item.title: Elementor and Contact Form 7 Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and Contact Form 7 work well together, with CF7 favored for advanced API integrations and Elementor Pro chosen for native design control. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Free form builders like Contact Form 7 require additional plugins to save form submissions to the database. Community Q&A Is Contact Form 7 compatible with Elementor? Yes, Contact Form 7 is fully compatible with Elementor. You can easily embed CF7 forms into Elementor layouts using shortcodes or dedicated widgets.

item.title: Elementor and GeneratePress Compatibility Guide
item.description: GeneratePress is highly recommended as a lightweight, stable, and fully compatible theme base for Elementor page builder projects. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Potential homepage display issues when assigning static pages in WordPress Reading settings. Community Q&A Is GeneratePress compatible with Elementor? Yes, GeneratePress is highly compatible with Elementor. It is a lightweight, stable theme that does not interfere with Elementor’s builder scripts. Why is GeneratePress recommended for Elementor users?

item.title: Elementor and WooCommerce Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and WooCommerce are highly compatible, but users often face performance bloat that requires optimization plugins, VPS hosting, or lightweight translation alternatives. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Performance bloat when combining Elementor, WooCommerce, and heavy translation plugins like WPML. Finding specific niche widgets like WooCommerce Brand displays within standard Elementor grids. Community Q&A Are Elementor and WooCommerce compatible? Yes, Elementor and WooCommerce are fully compatible, allowing you to build custom online stores.

item.title: Elementor and Wordfence Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and Wordfence are highly compatible, though users may need to temporarily enable Wordfence’s Learning Mode to prevent firewall false positives during page editing. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Wordfence firewall may occasionally block Elementor’s AJAX saving requests as false positives. Admin actions in Elementor might trigger Wordfence security alerts if Learning Mode is disabled. Community Q&A Are Elementor and Wordfence compatible? Yes, Elementor and Wordfence work well together.

item.title: Elementor and WP Rocket Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and WP Rocket are highly compatible, but users must carefully configure file optimization settings to prevent layout and styling conflicts. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Minification of Elementor CSS/JS can sometimes break page layouts Combine Files option in WP Rocket may cause rendering issues with Elementor widgets Community Q&A Are Elementor and WP Rocket compatible? Yes, Elementor and WP Rocket are fully compatible. WP Rocket helps optimize the performance of Elementor-built sites by caching pages and minifying files.

item.title: Elementor and WPForms Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and WPForms are fully compatible, with WPForms offering a dedicated Elementor widget and native email template customization. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Outdated theme templates can cause layout breaks Email template customization may require external add-ons or HTML for advanced layouts Community Q&A Are Elementor and WPForms compatible? Yes, WPForms is fully compatible with Elementor and includes a dedicated widget to easily embed forms into your Elementor layouts.

item.title: Elementor and Yoast SEO Compatibility Guide
item.description: Elementor and Yoast SEO are fully compatible and integrate directly, though some users express concern over backend bloat and advertising. Based on 5 community reports. Known Issues Backend advertising and bloat from both plugins can clutter the WordPress dashboard. Potential script conflicts if using multiple redundant Elementor add-ons alongside SEO plugins. Community Q&A Are Elementor and Yoast SEO compatible? Yes, Elementor and Yoast SEO are fully compatible. Yoast SEO includes a dedicated integration that allows you to optimize your content directly within the Elementor live editor.
